reference: Sir, my mother is about fifty years of age, and she has been suffering from a severe headache behind the left ear and severe neck pain for the past twenty-five days, along with seizures. She fainted for fifteen minutes, and nerve cramps occurred. The computed tomography scan of the brain has shown a calcified granuloma in the left lobe. Please suggest a better diagnosis and treatment.
text: Sir, I want to communicate with you about the last year and the next year, if I may, with you.
